seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs.
new_constraint: The email must contain at least 15 sentences, with each paragraph consisting of no more than 4 sentences.
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs. The email must contain at least 15 sentences, with each paragraph consisting of no more than 4 sentences.
response:
Subject: Resignation - [Your Name]

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification that I am resigning from my position. My final day of employment will be [Date]. I have truly enjoyed my time working with this team. It has been a privilege to contribute to our shared goals.

I am incredibly grateful for the opportunities I received here. You provided me with excellent mentorship during my tenure. I learned so many valuable skills under your leadership. These experiences will stay with me throughout my career.

I want to ensure a smooth transition before I depart. Please let me know how I can assist with the handover. I am happy to train a replacement for my current duties. I wish you and the company continued success.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]<turn|>
